nasb.text: “Now a famine came over all Egypt and Canaan, and great affliction with it, and our fathers could find no food.

esv.text: Now there came a famine throughout all Egypt and Canaan, and great affliction, and our fathers could find no food.

cnv.text: 後來埃及和迦南全地遭遇饑荒、大災難，我們的祖先找不到糧食。

ccb.text: 后来，埃及和迦南全境遭遇饥荒，灾情严重，我们的先祖们断了粮。

csbs.text: 后来整个埃及和迦南地区遭遇了饥荒和大灾难，我们的祖先找不到粮食。
